top_signals.title: Trump will oppose heavy US AI regulation, says outgoing tech adviser
top_signals.summary: Sriram Krishnan tells the FT the president is against a centralised regulator as AI backlash grows
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
